name: Bananas Foster
recipeIngredient: 1 Ripe banana, peeled and sliced lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a sauté pan over medium heat.
2. Add brown sugar and stir until well combined.
3. Add the sliced bananas to the mixture and continue stirring until evenly coated.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon over the bananas.
5. Pour over banana liqueur and rum, then ignite the mixture with a flame.
6. Baste the bananas with the flaming liquid, being careful not to burn yourself.
7. Once the flames die out on their own, remove from heat.
8. Serve immediately.
